arts.sum: QPR were heading for a frustrating defeat against Preston on Good Friday before late goals from Michael Frey and Lucas Andersen sent the away end into bedlam at Deepdale. The London club are unbeaten ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Queens Park Rangers vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
